title: viola × excerpta
intro: Viola × excerpta, also known as hybrid pansy or viola hybrid, is a man-made plant resulting from the cross-pollination of two different species within the Viola genus, combining the desirable traits of its parent species. It has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which have been attributed to its high content of phenolic compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits associated with Viola × excerpta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Viola × excerpta can be used as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and it is also sometimes used as a food coloring due to its vibrant purple color.
